title: The Nalanda University Act, 2010
full_text: The Nalanda University Act, 2010 नालन्दा विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2010 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201039 Act Number: 39 Enactment Date: 2010-09-21 Act Year: 2010 Short Title: The Nalanda University Act, 2010 Hindi Title: नालन्दा विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2010 Long Title: An Act to implement the decisions arrived at the Second East Asia Summit held on the 15th January, 2007, at Philippines and subsequently at the Fourth East Asia Summit held on the 25th October, 2009, at Thailand for the establishment of the Nalanda University in the State of Bihar as an international institution for pursuit of intellectual, philosophical, historical and spiritual studies and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 25-11-2010 Notification: 25th November, 2010, vide notification No. S.O. 2809(E), dated 18th November, 2010, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Nalanda University Act, 2010 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of Nalanda University as an institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Establishment and incorporation of Nalanda University. Section 5. Effect of establishment of University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. Governing Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Powers and functions of Governing Board. Section 9. Objectives of University. Section 10. Powers of University. Section 11. University open to all persons. Section 12. Visitor. Section 13. Officers of University. Section 14. The Chancellor. Section 15. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 16. The Registrar. Section 17. The Finance Officer. Section 18. The Controller of Examinations. Section 19. The Librarian. Section 20. Other officers. Section 21. Privileges and immunities of academic staff, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 22. Authorities of the University. Section 23. The Academic Council. Section 24. The School of Studies. Section 25. The Finance Committee. Section 26. Other authorities. Section 27. Statutes. Section 28. Statutes how made. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 31. Annual report. Section 32. Annual accounts, etc. Section 33. Conditions of service of employees. Section 34. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 35. Right to appeal. Section 36. Provident and pension funds. Section 37. Disputes as to the constitution of authorities and bodies. Section 38. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 39. Proceedings of authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 40. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 41. Power to remove difficulties. Show Related Subordinates Section 42. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 43. Transitional provisions. Section 44. Repeal of University of Nalanda Act.
